ideas.title: Logos Storage → Postgres-equivalent → Supabase-equivalent

ideas.excerpt: TLDR: make Logos usable as an app backend, not only as a storage substrate. Today Logos Storage is low-level: great for storing blobs/files, but not enough for most app builders. Most teams need a higher abstraction layer: structured data, queries, i
